name: Codex
summary: Route Codex API-key and ChatGPT-login traffic through DAM.
notes: Codex keeps its normal OpenAI API-key configuration or ChatGPT subscription login; DAM does not write a custom Codex provider or base URL.
Network Extension capture is primary for installed builds. The proxy env fallback is retained for source builds and unsupported environments.
`dam integrations apply codex` ensures a DAM-owned JSON profile file under the integration profile directory; it does not mutate Codex settings or shell startup files.
API-key mode routes api.openai.com through the HTTP adapter. ChatGPT-login mode routes chatgpt.com and ab.chatgpt.com through the WebSocket adapter.
{{codex_api_key_env}} stays owned by Codex or the user's shell; DAM forwards caller auth headers.
